Ban.name: Ban
Ban.description: A member of <The Seven Deadly Sins> bearing the mark of Greed. He gained immortality after drinking from the Fountain of Youth in the Fairy King's Forest. Despite his rough exterior, he is an exceptional chef with a delicate touch.

Bug.description: Even though he is a Demon, he secretly admires <The Seven Deadly Sins> for defeating both the Demon King and <The Ten Commandments>. Normally he takes the form of a tall, athletic man, but can transform into a small monster when the situation calls for it.

Diane.description: A member of <The Seven Deadly Sins> bearing the mark of Envy. In the past, she was falsely accused of treason and went into hiding, eventually settling in the Forest of White Dreams. She has a fondness for Meliodas, the leader of <The Seven Deadly Sins>.
